penalties.description: Task was not completed - only 2 of 6 objects were transferred back to the left side when the video ended.

consensus_score.reasoning: Claude identified incomplete task completion with only 2 of 6 objects returned to the left side by video end, while GPT-4o reported full completion. Given the specific frame-by-frame analysis provided by Claude and the automatic zero penalty for incomplete tasks in the rubric, the incomplete task penalty is applied. This results in a total penalty deduction equal to the time score, yielding zero points.

claude_value.description: Task was not completed - only 2 of 6 objects were transferred back to the left side when the video ended.

disagreements.rationale: Claude provided specific frame-level evidence of incomplete return transfers. The rubric requires all objects to be returned to complete the task, and incomplete task results in automatic zero score.
Claude's timing aligns with the detailed frame analysis showing task incompletion at frame 22 (4:05), providing more specific temporal evidence.

disagreements.resolution: Applied zero score due to incomplete task penalty
disagreements.rationale: Incomplete task penalty results in automatic zero score per rubric, regardless of completion time.
